prompt_snapshot:
16:9 horizontal Chinese blog body illustration, 2560x1440.
Use the provided chibi Avilia reference as the character identity anchor.

Scene: Avilia sends the generated blog package along a red ribbon path to a small cloud/server icon. A tiny flag says "online".

Core meaning: deployment publishes the blog to the web.

Style: clean Chinese blog illustration, white space, black/red/white, small blue network lights. Minimal labels: "deploy", "上线".

Avoid specific hosting logos, avoid marketing poster.
